case_title: GRANADA ENTERPRISE MANAGEMENT, LLC, VS. WAYNE COLIN HURT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ; EX PARTE ORDER OF THE COURT GRANTING STAY OF EXECUTION ; STAY UNTIL 5:00 PM ON JANAURY 31, 2017. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-08-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT WAYNE HURT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
